name: ArcGIS Maps SDK for .NET Toolkit UI Test Template
description: A template for creating new tests in the ArcGIS Maps SDK for .NET Toolkit UI test framework. This template should be run on the src/Tests/UITests directory.

PageName.description: The name of the new test page.

ControlName.description: The name of the control being tested (ex. ScaleLine, FeatureFormView). Only applies when creating a new test logic file.

TestsName.description: The name of the test file to be created (ex. FeatureFormViewTests, FeatureFormViewTests_Accessibility). If you just need to create a new test page and will add new test logic to an existing file, leave this unset.
